frames.name: Denial and Distance Frame
frames.description: Emphasizes Clinton's denials of knowledge about Epstein's crimes and his claims of ending their relationship before 2008
frames.emphasis: Clinton's testimony that he had no knowledge of sex trafficking and ended ties with Epstein in 2003

frames.name: Trump Deflection Frame
frames.description: Highlights Clinton's claims about Trump's relationship with Epstein as a counter-narrative
frames.emphasis: Clinton's testimony that Trump told him about having 'great times' with Epstein

frames.name: Photographic Evidence Frame
frames.description: Focuses on specific visual evidence and Clinton's responses to compromising photos
frames.emphasis: Detailed questioning about hot tub and pool photos with unidentified women

frames.name: Humanitarian Cover Frame
frames.description: Presents the relationship as primarily business/charitable in nature
frames.emphasis: Clinton's AIDS initiative work as the context for Epstein flights

outlierPerspectives: Detailed focus on specific photographic evidence and Clinton's memory claims about unidentified women (Daily Wire only)
Clinton's account of Trump's comments about Epstein relationship (DW only)
missingContext: Timeline discrepancies between Clinton's claimed 2003 end date and flight logs
Details about what triggered this congressional investigation
Legal implications or potential consequences of the testimony
Broader context of ongoing Epstein-related investigations
Verification status of flight records and photo authenticity
Hillary Clinton's specific testimony details beyond brief mention
